title: tridens elongatus
intro: Tridens elongatus, also known as slender tridens or slender sawgrass, is a species of grass that is native to the subtropical and tropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tridens elongatus include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Tridens elongatus is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems can also be used in tinctures or added to herbal remedies for its medicinal benefits.
